Brand Deep Dive

Brand Perception

Q33: Brand Attributes
Q19: Purchase Factors

NPS (Net Promoter Score)

NPS Methodology: Respondents rate each brand 0-10. Promoters (9-10) minus Detractors (0-6). Passives (7-8) are neutral. Score ranges from -100 to +100.

NPS Scorecard

NPS Comparison
Promoters / Passives / Detractors

Shopper Overlap Analysis

How to Read: This tool shows how often buyers of one brand also purchase from other brands. You can set different shopper types for the primary brand and comparison brands independently. For example, see what % of lapsed FOTL buyers are multi-buyers of Hanes. Select a primary brand and shopper type, then pick comparison brands and their shopper type.
